'''Rasit Brun''' was a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented [[Rintonne/Legends|Rintonne]] and the [[Lambda sector/Legends|Lambda sector]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After [[Kendra Tissido]] was attacked by a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] and five [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]] in [[Ando system/Legends|Andoan space]], Brun stated it was an act of war, and accused the senator of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], [[Lott Dod/Legends|Lott Dod]], that the company was involved in this incident having supplied the demilitarized [[Ando/Legends|Ando]] with weapons.
